info.title: Direct Deposit Management API
info.description:
Internal, front-end VA applications can use
this API to let eligible Veterans or their
beneficiaries manage direct deposit information
for VA disability, pension, and education benefit payments.

This API offers functionality to:
* Return, create, or update direct deposit
banking information for disability, pension,
and education benefit compensation and payments.
* Support payments to Veterans, spouses,
and other beneficiaries.
* Determine eligibility for direct deposit
by detecting if disability, pension, or
education benefits are awarded to an individual.
* Validate routing information.
* Auto-populate payment info into the
online 526 claim process.

This API does not perform some direct deposit tasks. Use VA.gov to
[set up direct deposit for VA travel pay reimbursement](https://www.va.gov/resources/how-to-set-up-direct-deposit-for-va-travel-pay-reimbursement/)

Note: If a Veteran needs to change the address returned with
direct deposit information, they should [update the address on VA Profile](https://www.va.gov/change-address/).

## Technical overview
For fraud prevention purposes, the front-end consumer
must obtain successful 2FA authentication of the user
before allowing direct deposit inquiry or maintenance
through this API. 



The Direct Deposit Management API receives an Integration
Control Number (ICN) in the API request and checks the
following:

1. if the requester is a Veteran or a Dependent, and
2. if they are eligible to receive payments via direct deposit
for disability payment, pension, or education benefits.

If the requester is confirmed as eligible to receive a
direct deposit payment, the API grants access to deposit account
information. 



The API submits all changes made to account information to the VA source
system for validation and posting. This validation detects if the account
is flagged for prior potential fraud activity and rejects the request
for updates, The Lighthouse API returns an HTTP 422 error message that
the update was not made due to a fraud indicator.

### Errors
For some responses, more than one error may be applicable.
For this reason, the error payload returns as an array.

### Authentication and Authorization
The authentication model for the Direct Deposit Management
API is based on OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect and supports the [client credentials grant](https://dev-developer.va.gov/explore/authorization/docs/client-credentials?api=direct-deposit-management).

**Important:** To get production access using client credentials
grant, you must either work for VA or have specific VA agreements
in place. If you have questions, [contact us](https://developer.va.gov/support/contact-us).

### Test data
Validate your application's integration with our API in
the sandbox environment using mock [test data](https://developer.va.gov/explore/api/direct-deposit-management/test-users).
Sandbox test data contains no PII or PHI but mimics real
Veteran or beneficiary demographics and benefits information.

### Getting production access
* When you're ready, request production access. Getting production
access requires multiple steps and can take over a month.
[Learn about requesting production access](https://developer.va.gov/onboarding).

get.summary: Get direct deposit account and eligibility and control information.
get.description: Get direct deposit account and eligibility and control information.

parameters.name: icn
parameters.description: The authenticated Veteran or beneficiary Master Patient Index (MPI) ICN

200.description: A Response which indicates a successful Request.

example.message: The server took too long to respond

put.summary: Create or update direct deposit account information.
put.description: Create or update direct deposit account information.

parameters.name: icn
parameters.description: The authenticated Veteran or beneficiary Master Patient Index (MPI) ICN

200.description: A Response which indicates successfully modified direct deposit information.

201.description: A Response which indicates successfully created direct deposit entry.

example.message: The server took too long to respond

canUpdateDirectDeposit.description:
All control information elements from the source system must be true ("Y") for update deposit to be set to true ("Y"), with the following exception:
one of the three payment type fields must also be true ("Y").
  1. isEduClaimAvailable
  2. hasCpClaim
  3. hasCpAward

More than one of these payment types can be true, but at least one of them must be for update deposit to be set to true ("Y").

isCorpAvailable.description: If user record is found corpAvailInd is set to 'Y', else it is not returned. In case of any exception, it is set to 'N'.

isEduClaimAvailable.description: If user record is found eduClaimInd is set to 'Y', else it is not returned. In case of any exception, it is set to 'N'.

hasCpClaim.description: If user record is found cpClaimInd is set to 'Y', else it is not returned. In case of any exception, it is set to 'N'.

hasCpAward.description: If user record is found authAwdInd is set to 'Y', else it is not returned. In case of any exception, it is set to 'N'.

isCorpRecFound.description: If user record is found, corpRecFoundInd is set to 'Y', else it is set to 'N' for retrieve operation. In case of update, it is set to 'N' if user record is not found or else it is not populated.

hasNoBdnPayments.description: This indicator only checks for Chapter 18 payments. If the PaymentInformationService has no paymentType for "Benefits for Children of Vietnam Veterans (inc. Spina Bifida)" this indicator is set to 'Y'.

hasIndentity.description: If the user record is found and the last name and birth date matches with the queried parameters, indentityInd is set to 'Y' or else it is set to 'N'.

hasIndex.description: If index record is found on BDN, indexInd is set based on who owns the Index (Award) record. If it is owned by VETSNET, it is set to 'V' and if it is owned by BDN it is set to 'B'. If index record is not found, it is set to 'X'.

isCompetent.description: If person is incompetent, incompetentInd is set to 'Y' or else it is set to 'N'. If the user has an existing fiduciary or is incompetent (by rating or by court), no address information will be displayed or updatable.

hasMailingAddress.description: If the Mailing address exists this field was set to 'Y', else it was set to 'N'.

hasNoFiduciaryAssigned.description: If person record has a fiduciary, fiduciaryInd is set to 'Y' or else it is set to 'N'. If the user has an existing fiduciary, no address information will be displayed or updatable.

isNotDeceased.description: If person record is found and has Date of Death, deathDtInd is set to 'Y' or else it is set to 'N'.

hasPaymentAddress.description: If the Payment Address exists this field is set to 'Y', else it was set to 'N'.

accountType.description: The User Banking Account Type for Direct Deposit (Checking or Savings)

accountNumber.description: The User Account Number for Direct Deposit. Minimum 4 and maximum 17 alphanumeric characters are required for this value.

financialInstitutionRoutingNumber.description: The Routing Number of the User's Bank

financialInstitutionName.description: The Name of the User's Bank

example.detail: Unable to update: account fraud indicator = true.

scopes.direct-deposit-management.read: The veteran's access to direct deposit management that provides viewing of current EFT settings.
scopes.direct-deposit-management.write: The veteran's access to direct deposit management that provides updating of current EFT settings.
